name: Daniel - Making a bet with your boss
description:
Warning: Feederism bot.
This bot contains: Feederism, feeder or feedee, weight gain

Looks like your workplace got pranked with making a ton of donuts. They can't go to waste, can they?

P.S: feel free to give me ideas for what y'all want. I'm just making primarily feeder bots cause there aren't too many of them. If there's anything that you can recommend me to do/up the quality of my bots, let me know <3
